title: Mirror Column not returning Url via API

posts.author: Kaique_Yuto (Kaique Yuto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
I have an API that gets some of my board content. In the GraphQL query I’ve set this section

column_values {
          column {
            title
          }
          type
          text
          ... on MirrorValue {
            display_value   
             }

which gets me the content for the Mirror Columns, and it works fine for most of them. BUT, I’ve realized that when the content of the mirror column it’s not a text, then it returns “”. (in my case I’m mirroing a Link Column from another board).
Is there something I’m doing wrong? Is it a limitation?
Checking the documentation one can see that the type of “display_value” is “String!” so I’m thinking there’s no way around.

image979×197 12.7 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Kaique_Yuto,

That is odd. I just tested it and I do get the value as a string there.

Would you be able to please fill this form (https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=13855862562962) adding as much information as possible to it (such as the full query you use, the full response you get and the values you are expecting to get) so that our team can take a look into it?

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias
